info.description: Global footer configuration. Link columns are managed via the Navigation collection (identifiers: footer-particle, footer-products, footer-bundles, footer-legal).

show_trustpilot.description: Show the Trustpilot mini widget in the newsletter column.

payment_icons.description: Payment method logos shown in the footer (e.g. PayPal, Visa, Mastercard).

skin_cancer_badge.description: Skin Cancer Foundation membership badge image.
